reference: I have pain and pressure only in the center, right above the pubic bone, and some lower back pain. I was thinking it is a urinary tract infection, but the tests came back fine. They thought I may have a bacterial infection, but my question is if it could be constipation. Would it hurt in that spot? I was thinking constipation would bother more higher in the abdomen, but I am just checking to see if constipation could affect the feeling of having a full bladder.
text: I have pain and pressure only in the center, right above the pubic bone, and some lower back pain. I was thinking it is a urinary tract infection, but the tests came back fine. They thought I may have a bacterial infection, but my question is if it could be constipation. Would it hurt in that spot? I was thinking constipation would bother more higher in the abdomen, but I am just checking to see if constipation could affect the feeling of having a full bladder.
